detectors.description:
Reentrancy in DOGECLASSIC2._transfer(address,address,uint256) (DOGECLASSIC2.sol#689-813):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (DOGECLASSIC2.sol#753)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (DOGECLASSIC2.sol#827-839)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (DOGECLASSIC2.sol#759)
		- _developmentAddress.transfer(amount.div(2)) (DOGECLASSIC2.sol#847)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount.div(2)) (DOGECLASSIC2.sol#849)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (DOGECLASSIC2.sol#811)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (DOGECLASSIC2.sol#975)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (DOGECLASSIC2.sol#955)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (DOGECLASSIC2.sol#957)
	DOGECLASSIC2._rOwned (DOGECLASSIC2.sol#329) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- DOGECLASSIC2._takeTeam(uint256) (DOGECLASSIC2.sol#969-977)
	- DOGECLASSIC2._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (DOGECLASSIC2.sol#929-965)
	- DOGECLASSIC2.balanceOf(address) (DOGECLASSIC2.sol#515-519)
	- DOGECLASSIC2.constructor() (DOGECLASSIC2.sol#425-479)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (DOGECLASSIC2.sol#811)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (DOGECLASSIC2.sol#983)
	DOGECLASSIC2._rTotal (DOGECLASSIC2.sol#341) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- DOGECLASSIC2._getCurrentSupply() (DOGECLASSIC2.sol#1133-1145)
	- DOGECLASSIC2._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (DOGECLASSIC2.sol#981-987)
	- DOGECLASSIC2.constructor() (DOGECLASSIC2.sol#425-479)
	- DOGECLASSIC2.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (DOGECLASSIC2.sol#611-633)
